text:
Created attachment 155884
net/freeradius3 patch to upgrade to 3.0.8

FreeRADIUS 3.0.8 was released today. The main focus of the release is stability.

http://freeradius.org/press/index.html#3.0.8

Attached is a diff to upgrade net/freeradius3 to 3.0.8, and poudriere testport output.
